title: Misdirected faxes containing health information end up in apartment managers' hands
summary: In July 2004, it was reported in the Edmonton Journal that a couple who managed an apartment building had received facsimile transmissions in error from various sources. These transmissions contained personal medical information. The Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada and the Office of the Information and Privacy Commissioner of...
